name: Impossible Ham and Asparagus Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Fresh asparagus; cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a 10 x 1 1/2" pie plate.
3. In the prepared pie plate, sprinkle diced ham, 1 cup of shredded cheese, asparagus, and sliced green onions.
4. In a blender or bowl, beat together milk, eggs, Bisquick, salt, and pepper until smooth (blend for 15 seconds on high or whisk for 1 minute).
5. Pour the batter over the vegetables in the pie plate.
6. Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean. Sprinkle with an additional 1/2 cup of cheese.
7. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before serving.
8. This recipe serves 6-8 portions. For 3-4 servings: Prepare as directed, but use a 8 x 1 1/4" pie plate and halve the amounts of all ingredients except Bisquick and eggs. Use 1/2 cup of Bisquick and 2 eggs. Bake for 35-40 minutes.
